languages.text: "Я дам вам возможность быть частью Человечества, а не его врагами!"
"I shall give you the chance to be part of Humanity, rather than its enemies!"
languages.original_text: "Я дам вам возможность быть частью Человечества, а не его врагами!"

traits.locale_text: "I shall give you the chance to be part of Humanity, rather than its enemies!"

languages.text: “我会给你们机会，让你们成为人类的一份子，而非人类之敌！”
languages.original_text: "I shall give you the chance to be part of Humanity, rather than its enemies!"

traits.locale_text: “我会给你们机会，让你们成为人类的一份子，而非人类之敌！”

languages.text: "Size İnsanlığın düşmanı olmak yerine onun bir parçası olma şansı vereceğim!"
languages.original_text: "I shall give you the chance to be part of Humanity, rather than its enemies!"

traits.locale_text: "Size İnsanlığın düşmanı olmak yerine onun bir parçası olma şansı vereceğim!"

languages.text: « Je vous offre une chance d'intégrer l'humanité plutôt que de l'affronter ! »
languages.original_text: "I shall give you the chance to be part of Humanity, rather than its enemies!"

traits.locale_text: « Je vous offre une chance d'intégrer l'humanité plutôt que de l'affronter ! »

languages.text: «¡Les daré la oportunidad de unirse a la Humanidad, en lugar de a sus enemigos!».
languages.original_text: "I shall give you the chance to be part of Humanity, rather than its enemies!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Les daré la oportunidad de unirse a la Humanidad, en lugar de a sus enemigos!».

languages.text: "Ich gebe Euch die Chance, Teil der Menschheit zu sein, nicht ihrer Feinde!"
languages.original_text: "I shall give you the chance to be part of Humanity, rather than its enemies!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich gebe Euch die Chance, Teil der Menschheit zu sein, nicht ihrer Feinde!"

languages.text: 「私は貴様らに、人類の敵ではなく、人類の一員となる機会を授けよう！」
languages.original_text: "I shall give you the chance to be part of Humanity, rather than its enemies!"

traits.locale_text: 「私は貴様らに、人類の敵ではなく、人類の一員となる機会を授けよう！」
